title: SUPPORT FOR FAMILIES OF INCARCERATED INDIVIDUALS - 211info
text: OREGON CURE SUPPORT FOR FAMILIES OF INCARCERATED INDIVIDUALS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers monthly support groups and orientations for families with incarcerated members to help them understand the incarceration process and its impact on family life. 7805 SW 40th Avenue Portland, OR 97280 Eligibility: Adult family members and friends of incarcerated individuals Hours: Varies by program Email Get Directions Visit Website Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Email or visit website for more information FEES: None, although donations are requested DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: In Person Support Groups * Families/Friends of Inmates/Ex-Offenders Specialized Information and Referral * Offender/Ex-Offender Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON CURE
